---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Be as specific or as general as you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Workarounds you're currently using?

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps, or other context that would help.
